infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Hajj Proximity needs your location at all times to alert you when you approach a Meeqat boundary or enter the Haram, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Hajj Proximity uses your location to show your position on the map and calculate distances to Meeqat points.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Hajj Proximity needs your location at all times to alert you when you approach a Meeqat boundary or enter the Haram.
